title: Verdict
description: What the auditor agent emits. PLAN.md §1.2. FROZEN CONTRACT.

fault_present.description: False when the auditor judges the trace clean; true when it predicts a process fault.

predicted_step_id.description: step_id (copied VERBATIM from the trace) of the faulty span, or null if the auditor judges the trace clean.

failure_type.description: Predicted failure category, or null for a clean trace.
